productDisplayName: Murcia Women Casual Navy Blue Handbag
description: Specialising in fashionable style, and crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This effortlessly cool carry-all with its velveteen sheen adds a shot of high voltage colour to minimalist ensembles. You can also wear this with tonal colour block outfits. Made from synthetic leatherette, with a velveteen upper Has a roomy zippered compartment with a zippered pocket Two shoulder straps Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
